programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Tom Schwarz
programme.desc: On June 15th, 2019 Tyson Fury went up against Tom Schwarz for the WBO Intercontinental Heavyweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted two rounds ending by technical knockout securing Fury's win.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On December 6th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao battled Oscar De La Hoya at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a thrilling bout that lasted 8/12 rounds resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2005 Miguel Cotto fought DeMarcus Corley for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at the Coliseo Ruben Rodriguez in Bayamon with Corley going down twice in the 5th round securing the technical knockout victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Carlos Alberto Ramon Rios
programme.desc: On February 17th, 1999, Floyd Mayweather fought Carlos Rios for the WBC Super Featherweight Title in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Rios was a tough opponent for Mayweather, but Mayweather prevailed and showed out in front of his hometown, winning by UD.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Shane Mosley
programme.desc: On November 10th. 2007 Miguel Cotto fought Shane Mosley at Madison Square Garden in New York City for the WBA World welterweight title in a full 12 round bout that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Diego Corrales
programme.desc: On January 20th, 2001 Floyd Mayweather faced Diego Corrales in a battle for the WBC World super feather weight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas ending in a technical knockout victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Antonio Margarito vs Miguel Cotto 1
programme.desc: On July 26th, 2008, Antonio Margarito fought Miguel Cotto for the WBA World Welterweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, in a very close and entertaining fight.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: While many of the guys' wives and children are in Africa doing charity work, Willie and Jase get into a debate over tracking ability which leads to a challenge--can Jase and Si track and capture Willie and Jep?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The ice road season opens and quickly claims its first victim with a road-closing wreck. Meanwhile, another trucker breaks through the ice en route to the isolated town of Bettles.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon NIGHTSTRIKE, who plunges the team members into their worst fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. With Cybertron now in orbit, the Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters. A small Autobot team heads to Cybertron to stop Megatron, while the rest of the Autobots try to protect Earth. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons’ hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons' hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Deep in the “Demon Swamp” on the island of Bali, large robotic insects are eating everything in their path and terrorizing the islanders. Megatron realizes they are an ancient breed of Decepticons, and forms an alliance with these powerful Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Spike is wounded and knocked unconscious in a Decepticon attack, Sparkplug and Wheeljack reluctantly transfer his consciousness into their experimental robot, Autobot X, to save him.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: With Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, any object in motion can be frozen. Although it may prove valuable in the fight against evil, it may also prove too dangerous to exist…especially once Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Tankor uncovers an ancient weapon with the power to turn organic material into cybernetic metal. Nightscream gets hit by the weapon and the Maximals race against time to save him from going off-line.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap uncovers a catalyst program that speeds up the growth of Cybertron's newfound plant life. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia discovers that Thrust's spark is actually Waspinator's and that Jetstorm's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Megatron prepares a doomsday weapon that can wipe out everything organic on Cybertron – including the Maximals. Meanwhile, Optimus discovers his own doomsday weapon...

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Optimus destroys Cybertron and realises that the oracle sent them to Earth to bring back organic life, for there to be a balance between technology and organic.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: While trying to recruit the Vehicons, the Maximals discover themselves being stalked by an all-new threat.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals attempt to infiltrate Megatron's former fortress, only to have their mission threatened by their supposed new ally!

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Blackarachnia finally revives Silverbolt, although he is not happy with his new form.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals are infected with a virus that turns them against each other. Optimus has second thoughts about his plan for harmony.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: A seemingly empty spaceship crashes onto Cybertron. When Optimus re-formats the transformer she joins the Maximals. Her name is Botanica.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Norwegian Nightmare, Nikki Krampus makes her long-awaited debut. Beaten in a back alley, Keta Rush seeks revenge against her assailant The Dagger. But Keta soon finds that to succeed she will have to fight off the more than just The Dagger.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: A new Champion in WOW is coming to terms with the fact the bullseye of her competitors is now squarely focused on her. Havok, The Monster Of Madness emerges as a threat to the WOW roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Dedicated to her ambition of never quitting, Stephy Slays demonstrates perseverance in an extraordinary match against The Disciplinarian. The smart ending will be unforgettable. Meanwhile, Tessa Blanchard takes her biggest risk since joining WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard is the new WOW World Champion, and The Beast, Jungle Grrrl, and Havok The Monster Of Madness have lined up to challenge the Champion. A Triple Threat Number One Contender Match will decide who will wrestle Tessa Blanchard.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard seemingly conspires with World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez to handpick her Championship opponent ...WOW’s newest competitor, Mexico’s high flying Luchadora Serpentine.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Foes Jungle Grrrl and The Beast are forced to put aside their differences to battle The Monsters of Madness, Havok, and Hazard. Can the two animals of the ring coexist long enough to secure victory? The Tag Team Championship Series continues.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The animals of the ring, The Beast and Jungle Grrrl battle to determine dominance. Meanwhile, WOW World Champion Tessa Blanchard seizes an opportunity to settle a score.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: After months of being bullied, Stephy Slays finally gets her shot at revenge against The Governor’s Daughter, Abilene Maverick. The Tag Team Championship continues when The Monsters of Madness battle The Dixie Darlings, Jolene, and Jolynn.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Champion Tessa Blanchard and The Greatest Attorney in the World, Sophia Lopez conspire In an attempt to derail The Beast’s path to The WOW World Championship Title by placing The Norweigen Nightmare, Nikki Krampus in her way.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Anticipation builds as Jungle Grrrl gets a rematch against The Beast to determine the rightful contender to the WOW World Championship. To ensure a fair outcome, Champion Tessa Blanchard has been barred from ringside.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Jungle Grrrl calls out The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for her Championship Match. With her back against the well, Tessa is forced to get creative and strikes a deal with The Fabulous Lana Star. Will The Fabulous One help Tessa Blanchard or turn on her?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast calls out The Fabulous Lana Star for costing her a shot at The WOW World Championship. And Jungle Grrrl finally battles The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for the WOW World Championship in The Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Chaos, disorder, bedlam, and madness are all promised in a high-stakes Three-Way Elimination between The Monsters of Madness, Havok and Hazard, Holidead and Siren The Voodoo Doll, & Adrenaline and Fire.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Swamp People

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.desc: When Sam learns that her mother is being held in a Las Vegas jail, the gang plans to drive there and pawn their belongings to bail her out.
